page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.4xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is configured with 1 thread per core, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating systems and persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and high clock speed, the instance offers high compute density relative to its memory footprint. This hardware profile is designed for CPU-bound workloads that do not require massive memory allocations or local storage, such as high-performance web serving, batch processing, and compute-intensive application servers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.4xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor with an x86_64 architecture, delivering 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, it avoids hyperthreading resource sharing. The instance features 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and does not include local storage or dedicated GPUs. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This resource configuration makes the instance highly efficient for CPU-bound tasks that require dedicated processing power without a large memory footprint, such as batch processing, compute-heavy application servers, and high-performance web serving.
